functions.test_requirement: Cover client request listing, request detail viewing, and request editing in ProjectRequestsService.findAllByClient, ProjectRequestsService.findOne, and ProjectRequestsService.update on one UTC sheet.

preconditions: The authenticated client owns multiple requests
The viewer is an authenticated client
returns: Returns the request ids [req-2, req-1] for client-1 in descending createdAt order
Loads request answers and answer metadata for each listed item

preconditions: The authenticated client owns the request
The viewer is an authenticated client
returns: Returns request req-1 detail for the owning client
Keeps client@example.com and 0123456789 visible to the owner

preconditions: The request belongs to another client
The viewer is an authenticated client
exceptions: ForbiddenException: You can only view your own requests

preconditions: No project request exists for the requested id
The viewer is an authenticated client
The authenticated client owns the request
The update payload contains edited fields, attachments, wizard progress, and answers
The viewer is an authenticated client
returns: Saves the updated title, description, budget range, timeline, and tech preferences
Normalizes attachment metadata to brief.pdf / https://files.example.com/brief.pdf / application/pdf / 2048 / requirements
Deletes existing answers and stores the new answer q-1 -> Updated answer

preconditions: The authenticated client does not own the request
The viewer is an authenticated client
exceptions: ForbiddenException: You cannot update this request

preconditions: The authenticated client owns a PUBLIC_DRAFT request
There are pending broker proposals on the request
The viewer is an authenticated client
returns: Rejects pending broker proposals during the visibility change

preconditions: The authenticated client owns a PRIVATE_DRAFT request
The viewer is an authenticated client
returns: Switches the request to PUBLIC_DRAFT without rejecting broker proposals
